summary: DISPLAY bug (install works): install progress bar overshoots — '203.0 MB / 15.0 MB'. Numerator = git-archive download + pip requirements bytes; denominator (totalBytes) = archive-download only. pip wheels (~200MB) get fed into downloadedBytes during the installRequirements phase but never added to totalBytes. Site: routes/downloadManager.js progress path (~:288-326). Lazy fix = flip to INDETERMINATE bar during the pip phase (contract already exists; pip has no honest up-front total). Local+remote both use this path. Surfaced during the MPI-222 RES4LYF baked-drift test. Low priority, cosmetic.
